text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see something surprising when I pass by the
classroom.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Take off! Rapid Running Force, Umamusume Five!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Red as Hokkaido salmon roe—Red Special!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rumble, rumble!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe? What in the world is going on?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's a hero show! We gotta start thinking about
what to do for the Fan Fest, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I asked Biko if she had any ideas, and she
suggested a play where we act as heroes! A hero
show!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I thought we should make our plan now and
practice ahead of time instead of waiting till the
last minute.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, I guess we do need to
prepare something, don't we?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And it is indeed best to plan in advance... All
right, I'll help you out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, El Condor Pasa's class decides to put on
a hero show for the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: All right, so I'll be... um...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Wisdom deeper than the ocean—Blue Grass.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fssshhh!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: How's that?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm next.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Free as the clouds—White Sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoooo...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, all the good parts are taken! In that case...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll be the character who shows up midseason!
First-rate gold, descending from heaven—Gold
King!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sha-shinnng!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wow, you really built that up.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what about you, El? What are you gonna
do?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm... gonna pass.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! Why?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No, I feel... fine. I've just decided to walk a
different path from everyone else.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I can't just play around with everyone anymore.
I'm a lone Aztec hero, fighting on my own.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Chao.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa leaves. It seems she's also drawing
a line in her private life to separate herself from
the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: She left...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The hero show practice continues without El
Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What should we do?! We're all doomed at this
rate!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Curse that evil Horsegirl organization. What kind of
despicable lowlife isn't captivated by the glitter
of gold?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Aren't you, like, way worse?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My strategy doesn't seem to be working at all.
What do we do?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha! Looks like you're havin' a little trouble!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Th-that voice?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Soy yo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The gallant hero! The raging storm! The
mysterious masked warrior—Aztec Condor comes
to the rescue!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El?! I thought you weren't gonna join!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Tsk tsk tsk. It was all a ploy to shock and delight
everyone!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Even if we walk different paths, we're still friends!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's like my papa told me...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
"The mark of a true entertainer is not simply
strength, but the delight of the fans!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is delighted to see El Condor Pasa jump
in. It certainly wouldn't have been this exciting if
she had joined in from the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's a true entertainer. Her penchant for
bringing joy is likely to have a great impact on
her future.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! So the Umamusume Five are all
together.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter. I, Pearl, one of the three
generals, shall still take over Planet Tracen.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Aaahhh, Pearl! When did you get back from your
trip to France?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Welcome hooome! You gotta tell us all about
your adventures and exploits!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you, El. Of course I'll tell you all
about it. But, before that...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking this planet as my own! Just try and stop
me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I was just thinking maybe it was time to
take a break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that Seeking the Pearl, one of El Condor
Pasa's most respected upperclassmen, has joined
the show, things are even more exciting.
